commentary: Long tempo run up the pass this morning. Summer legs are coming back. Racing a couple of 25Ks before the snow flies.
SAR season is picking up as the high country opens. Grateful for the volunteers who drop everything when the pager goes off.
Season's a wrap. Final tally: solid snowpack management, a lot of control work, and a team that kept everyone safe. Proud of this crew.
Spring Avy 1 field course dates are set. Two days in the Teton Pass area, 15 seats. Bring the right gear and an open mind.
Hard reminder this week that in-bounds does not mean risk-free. Know the day's advisory, carry your gear, and practice with it.
Mid-season snowpack update is out. A persistent weak layer is still lurking down low. Read the advisory before you head out.
Lifts are spinning and the daily advisory is live again. Here is to a safe season on the mountain.
WFR recert done for another cycle. If you spend time in the backcountry, wilderness medicine training is worth every hour.
